title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh, there's someone else here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I thought I was alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A person...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, are you here to rescue me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very nice to meet you, my name is ace

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I found myself swallowed up by the waves and ended up on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GOD DAMMIT, NOT YOU TOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well... this is a great oppor- tuning

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How about you join me in sailing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: On that ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That coffin is your ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm not worried, even if it sinks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can swim back and try again

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that thing doesn't even have ribs at- tached to the keel

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll get Swal- Lowed up by even the tiniest of waves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least make the pieces of wood long enough to cover up the cracks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Man, you're amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to know all that by just glancing at it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you a ship- Wright or some- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, you should know at least this much if you want to set sail

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh, I don't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's nothing to be proud of!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, let's build a ship to get off the island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Give me a hand, will ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You'll be a great help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah well... considering the currents surround- ing the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: things such as paddling or even tailwind won't be helpful whatsoever- in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a cove not far from here where things wash up.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Follow me! I'll show you around!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey!! Listen to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, you still haven't told me your name.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ditched my real name, along with my face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah, hence the mask.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had no idea this place existed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been looking for a good pen name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: pen name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I want to be a writer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shouldn't there be some leftover nations here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I looked around, couldn't even find a cracker.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Over here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I gath- Ered all of the useful stuff.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wood he had found was solid and sturdy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What is this for?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: party- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With those, you can even get drunk with fresh water!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one is gett- ing drunk! We're here to build a ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Why!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While his flattery certainly didn't hurt his case...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was something else... this unique aura about him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That motivated me to help with building the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing with all the stuff I worked so hard to gather!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the surface of wood is charted and carbonized

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 56 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
